meta.prompt: 显示该设备当前活跃告警类型
evalHints: alarmTypes is a string array field — must render each value as a tag or list item, not a table with index column
duplicate values indicate frequency — repeated alarm types are significant and should be conveyed
a frequency summary or tag cloud is more informative than a plain list
alarm type values are enums — use visual distinction (color/badge) for different types
